keys.description: Reference-catalog response cache. Emitted by geography.cache middleware for any GET on /api/v1/geography/*.
invalidatedBy: Any Country/State/City/... Created / Updated / Deleted event via listeners

keys.description: Cached resolveLocalizedName() output for hot country codes. Bypasses repeated Lang::has() + trans() calls.
Vendor's own cache + our DTO wrapper. TTL from config('world.geolocate.cache_ttl'), typically 3600s.
Cached DB path + version + last-refreshed-at metadata. Read by MaxMindFreshProbe.
Sorted set of top-N (path, query) tuples per locale for the warm-cache job.
